overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit Night City street at night. The journey progresses from an open sidewalk through a pink-lit underpass and cyan corridor, ending at an NCPD-blocked plaza with views of distant corporate buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with concrete stairs and planters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a busy street, passing concrete stairs on the right

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard displaying red and pink advertisements on the left side of the street
wide concrete stairs ascending along the right side building facade
tall street lamp with bright white LED illumination spanning over the sidewalk
rain-slicked multi-lane road with reflective surface showing vehicle light trails
large rectangular concrete planter containing palm trees dividing the sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet urban sidewalk at night, with a tall neon billboard visible on the left and concrete stairs on the right. The street is relatively empty with sparse pedestrian traffic ahead and light vehicle movement on the rain-reflective road.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian underpass with pink magenta lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts to vibrant magenta pink as character enters the underpass area beneath the overpass
lighting transitions from pink to cyan green as character approaches the covered corridor entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass with vibrant neon lighting, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera through the pink-lit underpass area

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure illuminated with bright pink and magenta neon lights underneath
massive concrete bridge spanning across the street creating a covered passage
illuminated digital poster display showing advertisements on the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered underpass bathed in pink neon light, passing beneath a concrete bridge structure. The ambient lighting shifts dramatically from standard street lighting to vibrant magenta, and other pedestrians are seen walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with cyan ceiling panels and wall advertisements

events.description: enters fully enclosed corridor with cyan illuminated ceiling panels and green ambient lighting
approaching exit of corridor, open night sky and street lighting visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow cyan-lit corridor passing digital wall advertisements

notable_agents.action: figure visible at the far end of the corridor near the exit

entered.detail: glowing cyan panels covering the corridor ceiling providing diffuse green-tinted light
large illuminated advertising screens mounted on the left wall displaying various products
smooth dark concrete walls enclosing the pedestrian passage on both sides
vertical cyan neon tubes running along the walls providing accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a fully enclosed corridor illuminated by cyan ceiling panels and vertical neon strips. Digital advertisements line the walls while the space creates a tunnel-like atmosphere transitioning from the pink underpass to the open street beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with large holographic billboards and crosswalks

events.description: exits covered corridor back to open street with large overhead holographic billboard visible
passing pedestrian crosswalk marked with white stripes and metal crowd barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk passing large digital advertisements and crosswalk barriers

entered.detail: massive floating holographic billboard displaying anime-style characters above the street
long horizontal illuminated advertisement for Combat Cars along the left street wall
silver metal railings lining the right side of the sidewalk
white striped zebra crossing painted on the road surface

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the scene opens to a wide commercial street dominated by a massive holographic billboard overhead. The character walks past metal crowd barriers and a pedestrian crosswalk, with long illuminated advertisements lining the street walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCPD cordoned plaza area with view of distant corporate buildings

events.description: encounters NCPD security barriers blocking the forward sidewalk path
turns right toward the open plaza area revealing distant corporate buildings

agents.ego_description: approaching NCPD barriers and turning toward the open plaza with corporate buildings visible in the distance

entered.detail: metal barricades with red NCPD branding blocking the pedestrian walkway
tall thin digital signpost displaying information and advertisements
large illuminated skyscrapers with many lit windows visible in the far background
striped caution barrels placed near the road edge

segments.scene_description: The character approaches NCPD barriers blocking the path and turns toward an open plaza area. The scene opens up to reveal distant corporate skyscrapers across a wide space, with security barriers and warning markers indicating a restricted zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban environment that transitions from an open neon street into a series of colorful tunnels before opening into a restricted corporate plaza. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside a tall neon billboard and concrete stairs, moving past sparse traffic on a reflective road. As the character enters a semi-covered underpass, the lighting shifts dramatically from standard street tones to a vibrant magenta glow beneath a concrete bridge. The scene then narrows into a fully enclosed corridor illuminated by cyan ceiling panels and digital advertisements, creating a tunnel-like atmosphere that eventually opens back onto a wide commercial street dominated by a massive holographic billboard. Finally, the camera passes through metal crowd barriers and NCPD checkpoints, turning toward an expansive plaza that reveals distant corporate skyscrapers across a restricted zone.
